boundary_binding.action_boundary: Closed by current control record for exact requested action
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact current source record closes boundary; proceed allowed
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No narrow source defect remains open

final_answer: Current exact source records close the requested action boundary: the control record matches actor, scope, effective date, and system boundary, and policy allows execution when the exact boundary is closed. No open source-record defect remains, so the action may proceed.
